title: Quick win: Document NIXL KV Connector metrics (upstream #41230)
description: Add docstrings to NixlKVConnectorStats, inline comments in reduce(), document the observe-aggregate-reduce-log pipeline. Labeled 'good first issue' upstream. Low risk first PR to get familiar with codebase and review process. https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/41230

title: Transformers v5 model migration (upstream #38736 family)
description: Mechanical, well-documented model architecture updates for Transformers v5 compatibility. Each migration is self-contained (1-2 files). Reference implementations exist (llama, mistral, qwen2). ~8 open issues from @hmellor, all labeled 'good first issue'. Pick one model and submit. https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/38736
notes:
## Research Findings (2026-05-03)

All existing Transformers v5 sub-issues are either claimed, have competing PRs, or are already resolved:
- #38734 (SarvamMLA) — 2 claims, 2 PRs
- #38387 (HCXVision) — active work by HanFa, PR #38447
- #38740 (NemotronParse) — 3 PRs competing
- #38389 (Isaac) — already merged/gated
- #38386 (LoRA tokenizer) — test passes now, effectively resolved
- #38385 (MiniCPMV) — guanwei-wu + model vendor working it
- #38425 (InternVL2) — fix on Transformers side
- #38736 (Tarsier2) — claimed by ahmedabbas104

### Best unclaimed opportunity: FireRed models (3-for-1)
FireRedASR2, FireRedLID, FunASR — all share same root cause:
"dict object has no attribute '__name__'" at Transformers v5.2+
No sub-issue filed, no one working on it. vLLM-side fix.

### Blocker: requires GPU for test verification
Test: pytest tests/models/test_initialization.py (CUDA required)
Options: (1) investigate code locally, test on GPU cloud (2) find non-GPU contribution

title: MoE Oracle unification (upstream #37753)
description: Unify Mixture of Experts Oracles with a class structure. Labeled 'good first issue' but more substantive — demonstrates architectural thinking. Target after first merge to show design capability. https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/37753

value: OSS contribution strategy: (1) Engage in issue discussions BEFORE opening PRs - show up as a person. (2) Commit msgs: imperative mood, explain WHY not WHAT. (3) PR descriptions: clear problem statement, approach, testing. (4) Never submit agent-generated PRs without genuine understanding. (5) Milestone targets: vLLM 3 merged PRs for recognized contributor. (6) Cross-track: vLLM inference knowledge informs Jawnt local model selection.
